title: [InstCombine] Bail out on type mismatch in foldICmpBinOpWithConstantViaTruthTable
source_patch:
diff --git a/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineCompares.cpp b/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineCompares.cpp
index 616cb04be9dbc..7f1ced9505b9b 100644
--- a/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineCompares.cpp
+++ b/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineCompares.cpp
@@ -3093,7 +3093,7 @@ Instruction *InstCombinerImpl::foldICmpBinOpWithConstantViaTruthTable(
               m_Select(m_Value(A), m_Constant(C1), m_Constant(C2)))) ||
       !match(BO->getOperand(1),
              m_Select(m_Value(B), m_Constant(C3), m_Constant(C4))) ||
-      Cmp.getType() != A->getType())
+      Cmp.getType() != A->getType() || Cmp.getType() != B->getType())
     return nullptr;
 
   std::bitset<4> Table;
test_patch:
diff --git a/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/icmp-binop.ll b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/icmp-binop.ll
index 161b290151e5a..3b4eca3ba69b3 100644
--- a/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/icmp-binop.ll
+++ b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/icmp-binop.ll
@@ -3,7 +3,6 @@
 
 declare void @use64(i64)
 declare void @llvm.assume(i1)
-
 define i1 @mul_unkV_oddC_eq(i32 %v) {
 ; CHECK-LABEL: @mul_unkV_oddC_eq(
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP:%.*]] = icmp eq i32 [[V:%.*]], 0
@@ -487,3 +486,20 @@ define <2 x i1> @icmp_eq_or_of_selects_with_constant_vectorized_nonsplat(<2 x i1
   %cmp = icmp eq <2 x i64> %or, <i64 65792, i64 65664>
   ret <2 x i1> %cmp
 }
+
+define <2 x i1> @pr173177(<2 x i1> %a, i1 %b) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: @pr173177(
+; CHECK-NEXT:  entry:
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[S1:%.*]] = select <2 x i1> [[A:%.*]], <2 x i16> splat (i16 179), <2 x i16> splat (i16 1)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[S2:%.*]] = select i1 [[B:%.*]], <2 x i16> zeroinitializer, <2 x i16> splat (i16 255)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[AND:%.*]] = and <2 x i16> [[S1]], [[S2]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP:%.*]] = icmp eq <2 x i16> [[AND]], zeroinitializer
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret <2 x i1> [[CMP]]
+;
+entry:
+  %s1 = select <2 x i1> %a, <2 x i16> splat (i16 179), <2 x i16> splat (i16 1)
+  %s2 = select i1 %b, <2 x i16> zeroinitializer, <2 x i16> splat (i16 255)
+  %and = and <2 x i16> %s1, %s2
+  %cmp = icmp eq <2 x i16> %and, zeroinitializer
+  ret <2 x i1> %cmp
+}

tests.test_body:
define <2 x i1> @icmp_eq_or_of_selects_with_constant_vectorized_nonsplat(<2 x i1> %a, <2 x i1> %b) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @icmp_eq_or_of_selects_with_constant_vectorized_nonsplat(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[S1:%.*]] = select <2 x i1> [[A:%.*]], <2 x i64> splat (i64 65536), <2 x i64> zeroinitializer
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[S2:%.*]] = select <2 x i1> [[B:%.*]], <2 x i64> <i64 256, i64 128>, <2 x i64> zeroinitializer
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[OR:%.*]] = or disjoint <2 x i64> [[S1]], [[S2]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP:%.*]] = icmp eq <2 x i64> [[OR]], <i64 65792, i64 65664>
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret <2 x i1> [[CMP]]
  %s1 = select <2 x i1> %a, <2 x i64> <i64 65536, i64 65536>, <2 x i64> zeroinitializer
  %s2 = select <2 x i1> %b, <2 x i64> <i64 256, i64 128>, <2 x i64> zeroinitializer
  %or = or <2 x i64> %s1, %s2
  %cmp = icmp eq <2 x i64> %or, <i64 65792, i64 65664>
  ret <2 x i1> %cmp
}
tests.source_program:
define <2 x i1> @icmp_eq_or_of_selects_with_constant_vectorized_nonsplat(<2 x i1> %a, <2 x i1> %b) {
  %s1 = select <2 x i1> %a, <2 x i64> <i64 65536, i64 65536>, <2 x i64> zeroinitializer
  %s2 = select <2 x i1> %b, <2 x i64> <i64 256, i64 128>, <2 x i64> zeroinitializer
  %or = or <2 x i64> %s1, %s2
  %cmp = icmp eq <2 x i64> %or, <i64 65792, i64 65664>
  ret <2 x i1> %cmp
}

tests.test_body:
define i1 @mul_unkV_oddC_eq(i32 %v) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @mul_unkV_oddC_eq(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP:%.*]] = icmp eq i32 [[V:%.*]], 0
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 [[CMP]]
  %mul = mul i32 %v, 3
  %cmp = icmp eq i32 %mul, 0
  ret i1 %cmp
}

define <2 x i1> @pr173177(<2 x i1> %a, i1 %b) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @pr173177(
; CHECK-NEXT:  entry:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[S1:%.*]] = select <2 x i1> [[A:%.*]], <2 x i16> splat (i16 179), <2 x i16> splat (i16 1)
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[S2:%.*]] = select i1 [[B:%.*]], <2 x i16> zeroinitializer, <2 x i16> splat (i16 255)
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[AND:%.*]] = and <2 x i16> [[S1]], [[S2]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP:%.*]] = icmp eq <2 x i16> [[AND]], zeroinitializer
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret <2 x i1> [[CMP]]
entry:
  %s1 = select <2 x i1> %a, <2 x i16> <i16 179, i16 179>, <2 x i16> <i16 1, i16 1>
  %s2 = select i1 %b, <2 x i16> zeroinitializer, <2 x i16> <i16 255, i16 255>
  %and = and <2 x i16> %s1, %s2
  %cmp = icmp eq <2 x i16> %and, zeroinitializer
  ret <2 x i1> %cmp
}
tests.source_program:
define <2 x i1> @pr173177(<2 x i1> %a, i1 %b) {
entry:
  %s1 = select <2 x i1> %a, <2 x i16> <i16 179, i16 179>, <2 x i16> <i16 1, i16 1>
  %s2 = select i1 %b, <2 x i16> zeroinitializer, <2 x i16> <i16 255, i16 255>
  %and = and <2 x i16> %s1, %s2
  %cmp = icmp eq <2 x i16> %and, zeroinitializer
  ret <2 x i1> %cmp
}
